HowItWorks.label: Process
HowItWorks.title: Three steps to better content.
HowItWorks.subtitle: Simple process, fast turnaround, great results.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Share your property details, brand guidelines, and what you're looking for. We'll put together a plan.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Reels, videos, designs — we handle everything. You review and approve before anything goes live.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Professional content attracts more views, more inquiries, and more closings. We keep optimizing.

Testimonials.label: Testimonials

Testimonials.t1Quote: Our listings used to sit for weeks. After Movika started doing our reels, we get inquiries within the first 48 hours. The quality speaks for itself.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.a1: Most content batches are delivered within 3–5 business days. Reels take slightly longer due to animation work. Rush delivery is available on Growth and Premium plans.
FAQ.a2: Each package includes designed social media posts, property reels, and a content calendar. Higher tiers add account management, story design, and brand strategy.
FAQ.q3: How many revisions do I get?
FAQ.a3: Starter includes 1 round of revisions per deliverable. Growth and Premium include unlimited revisions until you're happy.
FAQ.q4: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
FAQ.a4: No. All plans are month-to-month with no long-term commitment.
FAQ.q5: Do you post the content for us?
FAQ.a5: On Growth and Premium plans, yes — we handle scheduling and posting across all your platforms. On Starter, we deliver ready-to-post files.
FAQ.q6: Can you work with our existing brand guidelines?
FAQ.a6: Absolutely. We adapt to your brand colors, fonts, logos, and tone of voice. If you don't have guidelines yet, we can help create them.
